title: Smart Studio (AI Workspace)
lede: Smart Studio is your built-in AI creative department — chat with top models to brainstorm campaigns and draft copy, generate marketing images, and even produce short videos with Veo, all without leaving iMash. Here's the full tour, from your first message to reusing the results in real campaigns.

steps.title: Open Smart Studio
steps.content:
Everything happens in one workspace: a toolbar on top, your chat history on the left, and the conversation canvas in the middle.

  1. In the left sidebar, scroll to the INTELLIGENCE CENTER section and click Smart Studio. (You can also reach it from the top bar: click the Automation tab, then the SMART STUDIO chip in the strip below.)
  2. Take a second to map the screen:
    • Toolbar (top) — the AI Marketing Studio header with the Text / Image / Video mode switch, the Provider and Model pickers, a row of tool chips, and the New Chat button.
    • Chat History (left rail) — every past session, color-coded by type (blue = text, purple = image, orange = video), with its provider, age, and total cost. Click any card to reopen it; the red trash icon deletes it (you'll confirm Delete this chat? first).
    • Conversation canvas (center) — the messages, with a composer at the bottom.
💡 Tip: On phones, Smart Studio opens on the history list first — tap a chat (or New) to enter the conversation, and use the Options button to reveal the provider, model, and tool controls.

images.alt: Smart Studio workspace with toolbar, chat history rail, and conversation canvas
images.caption: The Smart Studio workspace: toolbar on top, Chat History on the left, conversation canvas in the middle.

images.alt: Smart Studio workspace with toolbar, chat history rail, and conversation canvas
images.caption: The Smart Studio workspace: toolbar on top, Chat History on the left, conversation canvas in the middle.

steps.title: Pick a Mode, Provider, and Model
steps.content:
One workspace, three creative modes — the toolbar adapts to whichever you choose.

  1. Use the segmented switch in the header to pick a mode:
    • Text — conversational AI for brainstorming, copywriting, and planning.
    • Image — generate (or edit) marketing imagery from a text description.
    • Video — generate short marketing videos with Google's Veo models.
  2. Choose a Provider — OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini. The list only shows providers that have models for the current mode (for example, only Gemini appears under Video, because Veo is a Gemini model).
  3. Choose a Model from the dropdown next to it — e.g. Gemini 2.5 Flash for text, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image for images, or Veo 3.1 for video.
  4. Notice the primary button in the top-right changes with the mode: New Chat, New Image, or New Video. Click it any time to start fresh.
⚠️ Note: Once a session has messages, its provider and model are locked to session (you'll see a gray tag next to the pickers). To try a different model, click New Chat and start a new session.

images.alt: Smart Studio toolbar with Text/Image/Video modes, provider and model pickers, and tool chips
images.caption: The toolbar: mode switch, Provider + Model pickers, and the per-mode tool chips underneath.

images.alt: Smart Studio toolbar with Text/Image/Video modes, provider and model pickers, and tool chips
images.caption: The toolbar: mode switch, Provider + Model pickers, and the per-mode tool chips underneath.

steps.title: Switch On Tools and Tune the Settings (Text Mode)
steps.content:
Before you send the first message of a text chat, the tools row lets you decide what your AI can reach for. Each chip is a simple on/off toggle — hover it for a description.

  1. Toggle the tool chips for your chosen provider:
    • Web Search (OpenAI and Anthropic) — lets the model search the web for up-to-date information. On Anthropic it's billed at $10 per 1,000 searches.
    • Google Search (Gemini) — grounds answers in live Google results.
    • Code Execution (Gemini) — the model can run Python for math, data analysis, and logic.
    • URL Context (Gemini) — paste a link in your message and the model reads the page.
  2. Tune the extra controls that appear for capable models:
    • Thinking — reasoning depth for thinking-capable models. Higher = better quality, more tokens.
    • Temp (Gemini) — randomness from 0 to 2. Lower (0.3) for precise, on-brand copy; higher (1.2) for creative variation. Default is 1.
  3. Click Advanced on the right for the low-frequency knobs: Top P (nucleus sampling — usually leave at 0.95) and Max output tokens (cap the reply length; the default 8192 is plenty for marketing copy).
💡 Tip: Tools and settings are chosen per session, before the first message. If the row is hidden, you're inside an existing session — click New Chat to configure a fresh one.

steps.title: Start a Conversation
steps.content:
Time for the fun part — your first draft, written in seconds.

  1. Type your request in the composer at the bottom — for example: "Draft a short, friendly SMS promo for a spring AC tune-up special ($89, this week only)." Press Enter or click Send (Shift+Enter adds a new line).
  2. The reply streams in live. Under each AI response you'll see its token count and exact cost — no billing surprises, ever.
  3. The session appears in Chat History with an auto-generated title (your first message). Keep the conversation going: ask for variations, a different tone, a shorter version — the model remembers the whole thread.
  4. Use the 📎 paperclip button to attach an image or video from your Media Library for the model to analyze (great for "write a caption for this photo").

images.alt: A Smart Studio conversation with a drafted SMS promo and per-message cost
images.caption: A live conversation — the AI drafts your copy and shows tokens + cost under every reply.

images.alt: A Smart Studio conversation with a drafted SMS promo and per-message cost
images.caption: A live conversation — the AI drafts your copy and shows tokens + cost under every reply.

steps.title: Set System Instructions (Your Brand Voice)
steps.content:
Stop repeating "keep it professional but warm" in every message — set it once and it applies to every turn of the session.

  1. Above the composer, click the Set system instructions pill.
  2. An editor expands. Describe who the AI should be, e.g.: "You are a B2B SaaS copywriter for ACME Co. Brand voice: professional but warm. Avoid jargon. Always end with a clear CTA."
  3. The instructions panel turns amber with an (applied to every turn) badge. Use Collapse to tuck it away, Edit to reopen it, or Clear to remove it.
💡 Tip: System instructions are the single biggest quality lever in text mode. A two-sentence brand-voice brief makes every draft come out 90% ready.

images.alt: System instructions editor above the composer
images.caption: System instructions apply to every message in the session — perfect for your brand voice.

images.alt: System instructions editor above the composer
images.caption: System instructions apply to every message in the session — perfect for your brand voice.

steps.title: Generate Marketing Images
steps.content:
Need a social post visual or ad creative? Switch to Image mode and describe it.

  1. Click Image in the mode switch. The toolbar swaps to image controls:
    • Google Search (Gemini) — grounds the generation in real-world references.
    • Aspect — the aspect ratio of the output (e.g. 1:1 for social posts, 16:9 for banners).
    • Size — output resolution (e.g. 1K, 2K, 4K — 4K costs about 80% more than 1K).
    • People — Allow all, Adults only, or Block people (handy for B2B or abstract creative).
    • Variants — how many image candidates to generate per prompt (1–4). Each variant is billed separately.
  2. Describe the image in the composer — subject, mood, framing, palette — and click Send. Example: "A bright, modern hero image of a technician tuning an AC unit, soft morning light, brand-blue accents."
  3. Hover a generated image for the Download button, or click it to view it full size.
  4. Want to edit an existing picture instead? Attach an image with the 📎 paperclip and tell the model what to change — it iterates from your file.
  5. Not quite right? Click Regenerate under a result — it puts the original prompt back in the composer so you can tweak it before re-rolling (it never re-sends automatically).

images.alt: Smart Studio in Image mode with aspect, size, people, and variants controls
images.caption: Image mode: describe the visual, pick aspect/size/variants, and generate.

images.alt: Smart Studio in Image mode with aspect, size, people, and variants controls
images.caption: Image mode: describe the visual, pick aspect/size/variants, and generate.

steps.title: Generate Marketing Videos with Veo
steps.content:
Yes — real short-form video, straight from a prompt. Video mode runs on Google's Veo models.

  1. Click Video in the mode switch and pick a model (e.g. Veo 3.1). The toolbar shows the video controls:
    • Aspect — e.g. 16:9 for ads, 9:16 for reels/stories.
    • Duration — clip length in seconds (e.g. 8s).
    • Resolution — output quality (e.g. 720p, 1080p; 4k is Veo 3.1 only).
    • People — allow or block human figures in the output.
    • Audio — Veo 3 generates ambient sound and SFX; switch it off for silent clips.
    • Enhance prompt — lets Gemini rewrite your prompt for better Veo results (usually improves quality — leave it on).
    • Negative — describe what you do not want, e.g. "blurry, low quality, distorted".
  2. Click Advanced for Seed (fix it for reproducible regenerations; leave empty for random) and Variants per call (generate up to 2 drafts — each billed separately).
  3. Describe the video — "a product spot, social teaser, or ad cut" — and click Send. Generation takes a little while; you'll see a Preparing video… indicator, and the finished clip plays right in the conversation with a Download button.
⚠️ Heads-up: Video generation is the most expensive thing in the Studio — check the cost shown under each result, and start with 720p drafts before rendering final 1080p/4k cuts.

images.alt: Smart Studio in Video mode with aspect, duration, resolution, audio, and enhance prompt controls
images.caption: Video mode with Veo: aspect, duration, resolution, audio, and prompt-enhancement controls.

images.alt: Smart Studio in Video mode with aspect, duration, resolution, audio, and enhance prompt controls
images.caption: Video mode with Veo: aspect, duration, resolution, audio, and prompt-enhancement controls.

steps.title: Anchor Videos with Frames, References, and Extensions
steps.content:
In Video mode the composer grows four role buttons that give you director-level control over the output.

  1. First — attach an image to use as the starting frame. Perfect for animating a product shot or a still from your brand library.
  2. Last — attach an image as the ending frame (Veo 3.1 only). Combine First + Last and Veo animates between them.
  3. Ref — attach up to 3 style/content reference images (Veo 3.1 only) to steer the look of the clip.
  4. Extend — attach a video you generated earlier and Veo continues it with another segment, picking up from the last frame.

Each button opens the Media Library so you can pick an existing file or upload a new one. Attached files appear as chips above the composer with a colored role badge (1st, Last, Ref) — tap the badge to reassign a role.

⚠️ Veo rules to know: frame roles (First/Last) and reference images can't be combined in the same generation, and Extend only accepts source clips generated within the last 24 hours — after that window, use Regenerate to create a fresh variation instead.

images.alt: Video mode composer with First, Last, Ref, and Extend attachment buttons
images.caption: The video composer: First/Last frame anchors, style references, and one-click extension.

images.alt: Video mode composer with First, Last, Ref, and Extend attachment buttons
images.caption: The video composer: First/Last frame anchors, style references, and one-click extension.

steps.title: Use the Media Library
steps.content:
Every file you upload and every image or video you generate lands in one shared Media Library — reusable across all your sessions.

  1. Click the 📎 paperclip button next to the composer. The Media Library modal opens.
  2. Filter with the two tab groups at the top: All / Uploads / Generated on the left, and All / Images / Videos on the right.
  3. Click one or more files to select them, then click Attach Selected to add them to your message.
  4. Need something new? Click Upload New to add a file from your computer — it uploads, gets attached, and stays in the library for next time.

images.alt: Media Library modal with Uploads/Generated and Images/Videos filters
images.caption: The Media Library: every upload and every generated asset, filterable and reusable.

images.alt: Media Library modal with Uploads/Generated and Images/Videos filters
images.caption: The Media Library: every upload and every generated asset, filterable and reusable.

steps.title: Track Tokens and Cost
steps.content:
Smart Studio is radically transparent about spend — you see the price of every single AI turn.

  1. Under each AI reply: the token count and cost of that response.
  2. Below the conversation: the session stats bar with running totals — Input tokens, Output tokens, and Cost — plus a chip showing the provider and model the session is locked to.
  3. In the Chat History rail: each session card shows its lifetime cost, so you can spot your expensive experiments at a glance.
💡 Tip: Text chats typically cost fractions of a cent. Images cost more (and each Variant bills separately); video is the premium tier. The stats bar keeps you honest.

images.alt: Session stats bar showing input tokens, output tokens, cost, and the locked model
images.caption: The session stats bar: running input/output tokens, total cost, and the locked provider + model.

images.alt: Session stats bar showing input tokens, output tokens, cost, and the locked model
images.caption: The session stats bar: running input/output tokens, total cost, and the locked provider + model.

steps.title: Control What Sub-Accounts Can See (Main Account Only)
steps.content:
If you run a team, you decide who sees whose chats and files.

  1. Click the ⚙️ gear button in the top-right of the toolbar (visible to the main account only). The Chat Access Settings modal opens.
  2. Set the Default visibility for sub-accounts:
    • Disable for all Sub accounts — sub-accounts can't use Smart Studio at all (they see an "AI Chat is disabled" notice).
    • Own chats & files only — each sub-account sees only what they created.
    • Main account + own chats & files — subs also see the main account's sessions and media.
    • All account chats & files — everyone sees everything across the account.
  3. Under Per-account overrides, give any individual sub-account a different level than the default (or set it back to Use default).
  4. Click Save.
💡 Tip: When history is shared, session cards in the Chat History rail show the owner's email, so you always know whose conversation you're looking at.

images.alt: Chat Access Settings modal with default visibility and per-account overrides
images.caption: Chat Access Settings: a default visibility level plus per-sub-account overrides.

images.alt: Chat Access Settings modal with default visibility and per-account overrides
images.caption: Chat Access Settings: a default visibility level plus per-sub-account overrides.

steps.title: Put the Results to Work
steps.content:
Smart Studio output is meant to leave the Studio — here's the payoff loop that turns drafts into revenue:

  • Copy → campaigns: paste drafted copy into your Email Marketing templates, WhatsApp campaign templates, or SMS messages.
  • Images → creative: use Download on any generated image and drop it into email headers, WhatsApp media, booking pages, or social posts. Generated assets also stay in your Media Library for reuse.
  • Videos → ads and socials: download the Veo clips for your ad platforms, landing pages, and reels.
  • Analysis → decisions: in Text mode with Code Execution on, paste campaign numbers and ask for a breakdown — the model runs real calculations, not vibes.

That's the whole workflow: describe → generate → refine → ship. Your marketing team just got a lot faster.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content: Questions about Smart Studio, models, or generation costs? Contact our support team at support@imash.io — we're happy to help you get the most out of your AI workspace.

metaDescription: Learn how to use Smart Studio in iMash: chat with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini models, generate marketing images and Veo videos, manage the media library, track per-message costs, and control sub-account access.
